# EnnobleRise Global Trust™

> EnnobleRise Global Trust is a nonprofit catalyst for human-centered transformation. It ennobles youth to lead with courage, equips educators to teach with purpose, and advances women as architects of resilient communities — through emotional resilience, financial independence, and mindful leadership. It serves 8+ countries across 5 continents with 18 program ambassadors worldwide.

Founded by Dr. Kasthuri (Kas) Henry, PhD, CTP — transformation executive, educator, social entrepreneur, and author of the international bestseller "Ennobled for Success: From Civil War to a US CFO". Her mantra: "Building to Last and Ennobling for Success."

## Core philosophy: ennobling, not just empowering
Empowerment assumes power must first be given. Ennobling recognizes that every human being already carries innate worth and potential; the role of education, mentorship, and leadership is to awaken and unleash it.

## Program pillars
- Youth Ennoblement: Mindful Leaders of Tomorrow — mentorship, emotional intelligence, financial awareness, and leadership development for young people.
- Teacher Leadership: Nurturing Humane and Resilient Minds — professional development, mindful teaching tools, and socio-emotional learning for educators.
- Women's Financial Resilience: Unleashing Economic Power with Purpose — financial literacy, vocational skills, and collaborative networks for women.

## Values
Humane Leadership, Mindful Growth, Resilience and Ennoblement, Purpose-Driven Innovation, Shared Prosperity, Peace and Justice, Stewardship of People and Planet.

## Pages
- [Home](https://ennoblerise.org/en): Mission, vision, values, pillars, impact.
- [About](https://ennoblerise.org/en/about): The ennobling philosophy and Dr. Kas Henry's founder story.
- [Programs](https://ennoblerise.org/en/programs): Detail on the three pillars.
- [Insights](https://ennoblerise.org/en/blog): Essays on humane leadership and reimagined capitalism by Dr. Kasthuri Henry.
- [Donate](https://ennoblerise.org/en/donate): Give once or monthly to any pillar.
- [Join](https://ennoblerise.org/en/join): Volunteer, ambassador, partner, and country-chapter applications.

## Contact
Email: Engage@EnnobleRise.Org · Phone: +1 (224) 536-1603
Languages: English (/en), Français (/fr), Español (/es)

## Signature programs
- Ennobled Futures™ — Youth Leadership & Life Readiness Academy: emotional resilience, financial resilience, and conscious leadership for students and young adults. "Preparing today's youth to become tomorrow's ennobled leaders."
- Ennobled Educators™ — Resilient Educator Leadership Institute: well-being, leadership effectiveness, and financial resilience for teachers and school leaders. "Empowering educators who shape the leaders of tomorrow."
- Ennobled Women™ — Women Rising Leadership & Empowerment Collective: emotional resilience, financial independence, and conscious leadership for women. "When women rise, families, communities, and nations rise."
- Ecosystem model: youth are inspired by educators; educators are strengthened by women; women empower families; families nurture youth.

## Michael G. Henry Legacy Scholarship™
"Educating Minds. Ennobling Hearts. Elevating Humanity." A scholarship honoring educator, minister, broadcaster, and humanitarian Michael G. Henry — investing in young leaders who master their craft, protect human dignity, and serve others. Apply at https://ennoblerise.org/en/scholarship. Selection: leadership potential 25%, character & integrity 20%, service 20%, vision 15%, essay 15%, financial need 5%.

## Brand
Official palette: Deep Compassion Blue #1E3A8A, Sunrise Gold #FBBF24, Purpose-Driven Green #0B6623, Mindful Coral #F88379, Resilient Teal #00A29E, Hopeful Sky #38BDF8.
